title: Agencies and Organizations to Notify Checklist
summary: The fuller notification list, spread across the following weeks — not all urgent at once.

tasks.title: Social Security Administration
tasks.explanation: Often reported by the funeral home — confirm it happened.
tasks.notes: Ask about survivor benefits and any payment that may need returning.

tasks.title: Department of Motor Vehicles
tasks.explanation: To cancel or transfer a driver's license and vehicle registration.

tasks.title: Veterans Affairs, if applicable
tasks.who: VA or a Veterans Service Organization.

tasks.title: All three major credit bureaus
tasks.explanation: individually. Prevents identity theft via a "deceased" flag.

tasks.title: Insurance providers
tasks.explanation: Life, health, auto, home — updating or claiming as appropriate.

tasks.title: Doctors' offices
tasks.explanation: to close records and cancel appointments.

tasks.title: An accountant or financial advisor, if one existed
An attorney of record
tasks.explanation: who may hold original estate documents.

tasks.title: Employer or former employer
tasks.explanation: for any pension, final pay, or benefits.
